benefits.description: Lost 80 lbs total, with 50 lbs within first 60 days and 60-70 lbs by day 90-120. Described rapid initial weight loss.

side_effects.description: Back and joint achiness attributed to rapid weight loss (50 lbs in 60 days)

protocol_notes: Brand name: Mounjaro (tirzepatide). Diet and exercise-based approach. Did not begin exercising until 90-120 days into protocol, after already losing 60-70 lbs. Noted various NSVs including reduced manscaping difficulty, belt marks disappearing, and underwear band changes.
